description: Letter (possibly a copy, as it is blank on verso and is set out more like a page of text than a letter) sending greetings to ‘ha-Sar ha-Niḵbad ha-Rav ha-Muv[h]aq [...] Moses’. Also refers to ‘Moses Sar ha-Alef’. (Information from CUDL.) NB: A previous description on PGP said "Letter to Abu al-'Ala and Abu 'Aja, written in Hebrew. The address on verso is in Judaeo-Arabic and contains instructions concerning personal matters and about the delivery of the letter." However, there is no address on verso, so this description (together with the transcription for verso) must belong to a different fragment. PGP also previously listed a transcription for the erroneous verso: לשיך אבו אלעלא ואגא פציצא בעד ארסאל האדא אלכתאב ננפדה מע מן נערף.
